CustomField.formula: TEXT((Contact.Need_Postings_For_Self__c * -1)) + " Need Postings For Self (Receiving)" + BR() + TEXT(Contact.Need_Postings_For_Others__c) + " Need Postings For Others (Giving)" + BR() + TEXT(Contact.Need_Responses_For_Self__c) + " Need Responses For Self (Giving)" + BR() + TEXT(Contact.Need_Responses_For_Others__c) + " Need Responses For Others (Giving)" + BR() + TEXT(Contact.Offer_Postings_For_Self__c) + " Offer Postings For Self (Giving)" + BR() + TEXT(Contact.Offer_Postings_For_Others__c) + " Offer Postings For Others (Giving)" + BR() + TEXT((Contact.Offer_Responses_For_Self__c * -1)) + " Offer Responses For Self (Receiving)" + BR() + TEXT(Contact.Offer_Responses_For_Others__c) + " Offer Responses For Others (Giving)"
CustomField.inlineHelpText: These values are added up to create your 'Give & Receive Balance'.
CustomField.label: Give & Receive Totals
